title: Hymenasplenium rahaoense

It belongs to the kingdom Plantae, specifically the division Pteridophyta, which comprises vascular plants that reproduce via spores. Within the division Pteridophyta, Hymenasplenium rahaoense is classified as a member of the class Polypodiopsida, which is a group of ferns that have a particular type of leaf arrangement. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its purported health benefits, including the treatment of fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties.
